docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOTLOW, WESLEY AS TO DEFENDANT LOOLY'S PBC, A FORFEITED DELAWARE CORPORATION DBA LE CUPBOARD JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
